title: Treat cookie and session definitions as public contracts
description: Rule for changes that touch CookieDefinition, SessionDefinition, or typed helpers.
contextText:
Cookie and session names, default values, groups, duration, security flags, serialization formats, and parsing behavior are externally observable.
Prefer additive changes and keep global cookie/session registries deterministic.
Review compatibility before changing existing definitions, deletion behavior, SameSite policy, Secure policy, or serialization formats.
Treat cookies, sessions, data protection, validation messages, and user-provided URL values as security-sensitive areas.
